data.body:
## Adversarial Review Findings Applied

### [Reliability] Define trigger condition precisely
detect-stack.sh returns `unknown` when no marker files match, but also `convention-based` for Makefile-only projects. Clarify: does `convention-based` trigger the template menu? The gate should check `stack=unknown` specifically — `convention-based` implies intentional setup.

### Done Definition Update: Interface contract with install paths
The gate must output a structured result (template name, install_method, and metadata from registry) that install path stories (7769-814e, ab8a-8a49) consume. The interface contract must be defined.
